files.help: XDG is supported out-of-the-box, so we can simply move the file to _$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/todo/config_.
XDG is supported out-of-the-box, so we can simply move the file to _$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/todo/config_.
XDG is supported out-of-the-box, so we can simply move the file to _$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/todo/config_.

If you don't have a configuration file, it's recommended you copy one from the installation-provided template in _/etc/todo/config_ to _$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/todo/config_

Otherwise, set the following in your configuration:

```bash
export TODO_DIR="$XDG_DATA_HOME/todo"
export TODO_FILE="$TODO_DIR/todo.txt"
export DONE_FILE="$TODO_DIR/done.txt"
export REPORT_FILE="$TODO_DIR/report.txt"
```
